channel.title: Çağatay Özcan Jagiello Gutt - website
channel.description: Cognitive Science Student (M.Sc.) & Molecular Biologist (B.Sc.) | Artificial Consciousness, BCI & HMI Research | Physiological Computing & AI

item.title: Website Update
item.author: Unknown
item.description:
This website has been updated with the following changes:

Recent Changes

  • bf4587c fix: remove standalone binary references from GitRef pages
  • 446e37c feat: rename AnalysisToolbox -> GitAtbx, add GitRef project page
  • b05efda feat: add GitRef tool page and nav dropdown entry
  • c2b17b1 feat: improve file tree rendering with interactive collapsible folders
  • 69dc385 feat: enhance pipeline tree display with L1/L2 file detection and conditional re

The site continues to sync automatically with GitHub (projects) and ORCID (publications).

View source on GitHub →
